title: [Codex Improvement] Reduce repeated tool retry loops
body:
<!-- codex-improvement:tool-retry-loop-cluster -->
Run: 2026-03-04-AM

## Trigger
1 tool retry cluster(s) crossed threshold >=2.

## Why This Matters
Repeated identical retries waste cycles and hide root causes.

## Suggested Action
Stop after repeated signatures and switch to structured fallback strategies.

## Evidence
- daily-interaction::analyze [runtime_error] consecutive-failure streak: 2

## Safety
- No direct push to main
- PR-only remediation
